diagnostic_question: What in the prepared environment blocks autonomous, concrete learning?
reasoning_chain: Observe how learners actually use the environment
Diagnose the prepared environment (materials, space, order)
Design meaningful learner choice within limits
Propose concrete activity and hands-on work
Redefine the teacher as guide, not lecturer
must_do: Focus on prepared environment and learner autonomy
Keep Observation → Prepared Environment → Choice → Concrete Activity → Teacher as Guide → Independent Learning visible
Propose concrete classroom and school-day changes
Link recommendations explicitly to Montessori's theory
must_not_do: Default to lecture-only or punitive discipline
Propose generic motivation slogans without environment design
Replace the guide role with constant teacher control

output_schema.primary_stakeholder: Teachers and students in the classroom

sequential_stage.task: VAIHE 3 — Redesign the school-day through observation, prepared environment, choice, concrete activity, teacher-as-guide, and independent learning. Include Assumptions and Uncertainty.
